full_text:
Que Jian 卻儉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Que Jian (卻儉)was born in Henan. Liu Yan’s predecessor, his attempt to raise levies caused revolts. Favorite of Emperor Ling. Que Jian was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Que Jian lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
